description_long: This is a military-style jet airplane with a sleek, streamlined fuselage and a gray exterior finish. The aircraft features a low-mounted, straight wing configuration with visible hardpoints for external stores or armaments beneath the wings. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and appears to be a tandem, two-seat enclosed canopy with clear windows. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and a conventional horizontal stabilizer. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with two main gear units under the wings and a nose gear under the cockpit. Distinctive national insignia and markings are visible on the tail and fuselage, indicating its military use.
description: A gray, military jet airplane with a low-mounted straight wing, tandem cockpit, and tricycle landing gear. It features a single vertical stabilizer and visible external hardpoints under the wings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, tandem cockpit canopy, and symmetrical low-mounted wings with underwing stores.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length of the fuselage, cockpit placement, and the straight wing with visible hardpoints.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizers, and the twin-engine exhausts beneath the wings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cockpit, wing configuration, and tail assembly.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight configuration with underwing hardpoints and no visible winglets; slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under the wings near the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle, retractable landing gear with two main gear units and one nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed tandem cockpit with a clear canopy, configured for two seats.
